2606.25568.title: Riazi-8B: An Urdu Large Language Model for Mathematical Reasoning
2606.25568.paper_summary: Recent LLMs demonstrate strong mathematical reasoning capabilities, but existing gains rely heavily on English-centric training resources and benchmarks. As a result, reasoning performance degrades substantially in low-resource languages such as Urdu, where reasoning-oriented datasets and adapted models remain scarce. Urdu lacks both reasoning-oriented resources and models adapted for multi-step mathematical problem solving, limiting the applicability of recent progress to Urdu-speaking users. We address this gap through Riazi-8B, an Urdu mathematical reasoning model developed through a two-step adaptation process comprising continued pre-training on Urdu Wikipedia and supervised fine-tuning on Urdu Chain-of-Thought data derived from GSM8K. We evaluate Riazi-8B on MGSM-Urdu against existing Urdu instruction-tuned models. Our results show consistent improvements in answer correctness, reasoning quality, response completeness, and Urdu generation. Our findings demonstrate that combining Urdu language adaptation with reasoning-focused fine-tuning is an effective strategy for extending mathematical reasoning capabilities to low-resource languages.
2606.25568.paper_summary_zh: 最近的LLM展示了強大的數學推理能力，但現有的進展在很大程度上依賴於以英語為中心的訓練資源和基準。因此，在資源匱乏的語言（如烏爾都語）中，推理性能顯著下降，因為針對推理的數據集和適應模型仍然稀缺。烏爾都語缺乏針對推理的資源和適應於多步數學問題解決的模型，限制了最近進展對烏爾都語使用者的適用性。我們通過Riazi-8B來解決這一差距，這是一個烏爾都語數學推理模型，通過兩步適應過程開發，包括在烏爾都語維基百科上持續預訓練和在基於GSM8K的烏爾都語思維鏈數據上進行監督微調。我們在MGSM-Urdu上評估Riazi-8B，與現有的烏爾都語指令調整模型進行比較。我們的結果顯示在答案正確性、推理質量、回應完整性和烏爾都語生成方面的一致改進。我們的發現表明，將烏爾都語適應與針對推理的微調相結合是一種有效的策略，可以將數學推理能力擴展到資源匱乏的語言。
2606.25568.author: Azher Ali et.al.
2606.25568.authors: Azher Ali, Ibtsam Haider, Raja Khurram Shahzad, Seemab Latif, Mehwish Fatima
